text.title: cron-automation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cron-automation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Diagnosing "job not running" without checking for stale lock files. If a script is killed mid-execution, the lock file remains and every subsequent run silently skips.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: flock holds the lock via an open file descriptor. When the process dies, the OS releases the lock. But agents checking the lock file's existence (not the flock state) will falsely conclude it is still locked.
